title: Consultants might profess a commitment to net zero, but they are core to fossil fuel propaganda playbook
description: Fossil fuel industry wants to expand oil, gas and coal production, and win approvals through modelling that exaggerates economic benefits and ignores their harm. title: A Rare Chance To Meet Kim Myung Soo (L) Is Up For Grabs At Fossil Malaysia
description: Fans of Kim Myung Soo, better known as L, have a new reason to visit Fossil this month. Fossil Malaysia is giving 25 shoppers the chance to meet the South Korean singer and actor at an exclusive fan event taking place at its IOI City Mall store on June 28, 2026.
